---
title: "KDD 2018 Tutorial: Building a Large-Scale Knowledge Graph"
description: "Slides from our KDD 2018 tutorial T39 — Building a Large-Scale, Accurate, and Fresh Knowledge Graph."
author: "synesis"
date: "2018-08-20"
categories: [knowledge graphs, conference, talk]
---

Thank you for attending our KDD2018 tutorial T39: "Building a Large-scale, Accurate and Fresh Knowledge Graph." The final version of the slides are now up at <https://lnkd.in/ga_vXKn> .


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_abstract-activity-6437340517599715328-WJTN).*
